name: mcp-tool-registration-pattern
description: MCP tools follow consistent pattern: (1) ArkType parameter schema, (2) registerXxx(server: FastMCP) function, (3) server.addTool() with name, description, parameters, execute handler. Tools return JSON.stringify({ok: true, ...}) or {ok: false, error: {...}}. Registry.ts collects all registerXxx functions. The db.* namespace will add 3 new tools following this pattern.
recommendation: Create db.connect.ts, db.migrate.ts, db.query.ts following this pattern. Add registerDbConnect, registerDbMigrate, registerDbQuery to registry.ts. Total tools will become 19 (16 + 3 new db.* tools).
